raw.message: ピクミンと毎日を過ごして、仲良し度をあげよう

hook.summary: Pikmin characters gather in a field with a question about growing them on a phone.
hook.visual_action: Various Pikmin stand around everyday objects like a cup and scissors on a green field.
hook.text_overlay: スマホでピクミンを育てられる？
hook.voiceover_transcript: スマホでピクミンを育てられる？

scene_flow: Introduction of Pikmin in a field with a question about growing them on mobile.
Demonstration of planting seedlings in the game interface.
Showing the player character walking on a map with Pikmin following.
Visual of Pikmin growing and appearing on screen.
Final call to action with the game logo and download link.
on_screen_text: スマホでピクミンを育てられる？
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers and Nintendo fans who enjoy walking and collecting cute characters.
